    Description
    AbandonedShip
    Represents an abandoned ship adventure card in the game.

    Represents an abandoned station adventure card in the game.
    AdventureCardFilip
     
    CombatZone
    Represents the combat zone in the game, which consists of multiple lines of combat criteria and penalties.
    Enemy<P extends Penalty,R extends Reward>
     
    Epidemic
    Represents an epidemic event card in the game.
    MeteorSwarm
    Represents a meteor swarm in the game.
    OpenSpace
    Represents the open space in the game, which is a type of adventure card.
    Pirates
    Represents the pirate card in the game.
    Planets
    Represents a card that contains a list of planets, each with its own landing rewards and a landing penalty.
    Slavers
    Represents a slavers encounter card in the game.
    Smugglers
    Represents a smugglers adventure card in the game.
    Stardust
    Represents a Stardust adventure card in the game.
